page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6e-c12g1.24xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server instance configured with 96 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 physical cores operating at 2.5 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The system features 736.0 GB of system memory, providing approximately 7.67 GB of RAM per core. It is equipped with eight NVIDIA Volta V100 GPUs, delivering a combined total of 256 GB of VRAM. This instance does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached options, supported by a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks show a clear contrast between single-core and multi-core capabilities. In stress-ng testing, single-core CPU performance is measured at 1104.49, which falls into the bottom 25% tier. Conversely, the multi-core CPU performance reaches 70674.73, placing it in the top 25% tier. This indicates that while individual core speeds are modest, the massive parallel execution capacity of 96 dedicated cores provides substantial compute density.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, this instance represents a high-density hardware class designed to consolidate massive parallel workloads. The absence of local storage requires careful architectural planning for external storage costs, but the high GPU-to-vCPU density makes it highly suitable for distributed deep learning, large-scale parallel simulations, high-performance computing, and complex rendering workloads.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6e-c12g1.24xlarge is a high-density GPU-accelerated server instance powered by 96 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 physical cores running at 2.5 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. It features 736.0 GB of system memory and eight NVIDIA Volta V100 GPUs with a total of 256 GB of VRAM. The instance does not include local storage, relying instead on network-attached storage supported by a 32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Benchmark results indicate a weak single-core CPU performance of 1104.49 in stress-ng, but a strong multi-core performance of 70674.73, placing it in the top 25% for parallel processing. This hardware profile is optimized for parallel computing workloads, including deep learning training, scientific simulations, and GPU-accelerated data processing.

tagline: A high-density parallel computing platform featuring eight dedicated graphics processors and ninety-six physical processor cores for intensive compute workloads.
bullet_points: 8x NVIDIA Volta V100 GPUs with 256 GB total VRAM
736 GB system memory and 32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth
Strong multi-core performance benchmark of 70674.73 in stress-ng
No local storage, requiring network-attached storage solutions
Best suited for deep learning, parallel simulations, and GPU-accelerated workloads
